programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.sub_title: Pop of Color at Popham Beach
programs.desc: The Triangle House has been a staple in Phippsburg since the 20s; a local artist, who's admired the cottage since childhood, bought it in the 80s; after more than a century of wear, she invites the Maine Cabin Masters to save the local landmark.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: The "Maine Cabin Masters" help out old family friends whose house suffered fire damage; the crew faces the challenge of working on the residence, while Ashley makes a scrapbook and a one-of-a-kind bench to honor old memories.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: After a massive storm in central Maine, the Cabin Masters return to two former renovations to help out. Multiple trees destroyed cabins and porches around the YMCA camp property while the Chadwick family's screened-in porch was crushed by a tree.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.sub_title: Out of the Ashes: Rebuilding in Gatlinburg, TN
programs.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Gatlinburg, Tenn., to replace a log home lost in the 2016 wildfires; they bring with them the Beam Cabin, but it's no easy feat to move these massive logs up a narrow mountain pass; designer Karen Tillery works with Mark.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.sub_title: Barn Storming: A Wild Takedown In Pleasantville, Ohio
programs.desc: In Ohio, Mark and the guys attempt to save a giant double pen barn, but high winds turn this complicated job into a treacherous one.

programs.title: Second Chance Stage
programs.desc: A grocer, client specialist, rancher, financial planner and teacher take the stage for their chance to achieve their long-delayed dreams.
